title: nosql_table
description: One NoSQL table or collection — one record per AWS DynamoDB table, GCP Firestore database, or Azure Cosmos DB container. Separate from managed_database_instance (which is SQL-focused). Policies check encryption, PITR, and deletion protection.

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

encryption_enabled.description: Table data is encrypted at rest.

stream_enabled.description: Change data capture / streams are enabled.
